title: Microsoft Security Blog — Author Hub
description: Author profile and full archive of security research articles published on the official Microsoft Security Blog.

title: Microsoft Tech Community — Security Experts Blog
description: Community hub for deep-dive security research and analysis, co-authored with the Microsoft security research community.

title: When Trust Becomes the Attack Vector: Analysis of the EmEditor Supply Chain Compromise
description: A technical breakdown of a supply chain compromise affecting the EmEditor update mechanism, covering the attack path, detection opportunities, and defensive recommendations.

title: CyberLab Con 2026
description: Conference session — see the event schedule for the confirmed talk title, abstract, and time slot.

title: LOLAI Project — Pull Request #5
description: Contribution to the LOLAI project, an open-source effort cataloguing living-off-the-land techniques relevant to AI systems and tooling.

title: LOLAI Project — Pull Request #6
description: Follow-up contribution to the LOLAI project, extending the project's catalogue of AI-relevant living-off-the-land entries.

title: LOLAI Project — Merged Commit
description: A merged commit to the LOLAI project's public site, part of ongoing contributions to the AI-security open-source community.

title: Detection-Rules
description: A personal, curated collection of detection rules for threat hunting and detection engineering, written for common detection surfaces and query languages.

title: LOLBAS (Fork)
description: Fork of the Living Off The Land Binaries and Scripts (LOLBAS) project, used to track and contribute to community research on abusable native binaries.

title: Leveraging Honeypots for Enhanced Cybersecurity: A Quick Overview
description: How deception technology and honeypots can surface attacker activity early, generate high-signal detections, and enrich threat intelligence.

title: How to Use Cloud Audit Logging for Threat Hunting in GCP
description: A practical walkthrough of using Google Cloud audit logs to hunt for suspicious activity and build cloud-native detections in GCP environments.

title: DGA Domain Detection with Shannon Entropy Analysis
description: Using Shannon entropy to flag algorithmically generated (DGA) domains and turn the technique into a repeatable detection for C2 infrastructure.

title: Tails vs. Qubes OS vs. Whonix: Choosing the Right Privacy-Focused OS
description: A comparison of Tails, Qubes OS, and Whonix across isolation, anonymity, and threat models to help pick the right privacy-focused operating system.

title: The Power of Correlation: Strengthening Security with DLP and Threat Hunting in Splunk
description: Correlating DLP signals with threat-hunting queries in Splunk to catch data exfiltration that either source would miss on its own.

title: Unleashing the Power of Threat Hunting and Threat Intelligence
description: A foundational guide to threat hunting and threat intelligence — how they reinforce each other and a path for getting started in the field.

title: Sigma Rule: Potential Vcruntime140 DLL Sideloading
description: Reported a detection gap to the SigmaHQ project (issue #5825) that led to a merged Sigma rule detecting vcruntime140.dll side-loading — shipped in the Sigma April 2026 release.

title: Google Dork: Apache Struts 2.x Path Traversal (CVE-2023-50164)
description: Published a Google Hacking Database (GHDB) dork on Exploit-DB to surface internet-exposed Apache Struts instances affected by the CVE-2023-50164 path-traversal vulnerability.

title: HSM-as-a-Service: Use Cases, Considerations, and Best Practices
description: Contributor and reviewer on the Cloud Security Alliance Cloud Key Management working-group publication covering the HSM-as-a-Service delivery model, security considerations, and vendor selection.

title: Key Management Lifecycle Best Practices
description: Contributor and reviewer on the Cloud Security Alliance publication detailing best practices across each phase of the cryptographic key management lifecycle.

title: Workshop: Career Avenues in Cyber Security — KBC NMU, Jalgaon
description: Delivered a session on career avenues in cyber security at Kavayitri Bahinabai Chaudhari North Maharashtra University, Jalgaon. Felicitated by Dr. Sanjay Wadnere; recognised in the university's 2021–22 Annual Report.

title: Workshop: Ethical Hacking & Cyber Security — Bharati Vidyapeeth COEW, Pune
description: Resource person for a hands-on Ethical Hacking and Cyber Security workshop at Bharati Vidyapeeth's College of Engineering for Women, Pune — listed among the college's major technical activities.

title: Microsoft Defender Experts Disrupt Jasper Sleet's Insider Access Campaign
description: Co-authored Microsoft Security Experts analysis of how Defender Experts detected and disrupted Jasper Sleet — a North Korea-nexus actor operating as a remote IT worker inside a live enterprise tenant — through proactive behavioral threat hunting.

title: The Future of Threat Hunting: The Hunter is Dead, Long Live the Engineer
description: Published author in the Black Hills Information Security (BHIS) InfoSec Survival Guide (Teal Book) on threat hunting — distributed in hard copy at the Antisyphon Threat Hunting Summit.

title: Shadow Payroll, Digital Ghosts: Detecting Remote Doppelgangers in Enterprise Tenants
description: International conference talk on insider-threat research into DPRK (Jasper Sleet) remote IT workers — using behavioral threat hunting to detect fraudulent remote employees embedded inside enterprise tenants.
